section_subtitle: Pick your flavor. Every pie is custom-made to order.

items.name: The Classic Margherita
items.description: Clean, simple, elegant. Just the essentials, done perfectly. One page, maximum impact — the timeless recipe that never fails.

items.name: The Supreme
items.description: Loaded with everything you need. Multi-page, responsive, SEO-optimized, and served with a side of analytics. The crowd-pleaser.

items.name: The Deep Dish
items.description: Rich, layered, and complex. Custom logic, database integration, user authentication — this one takes time, but it's worth every bite.

items.name: The Calzone
items.description: Beautiful on the outside, perfectly structured inside. Wireframes, prototypes, and pixel-perfect mockups — all folded into one delicious package.

items.name: The Slice
items.description: Quick, affordable, no-fuss. Got a bug? Need a tweak? A single slice is all you need. Fast turnaround, no minimum order.
